channel.title: theBalancedBriefNLtech
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from theBalancedBriefNLtech, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: The Best Kindle Accessories (2026): Cases, Page Turners, Stickers
item.description: Looking to better protect your Kindle or add a little personality to your favorite e-reader? From cases and covers to page turners and even charms, th...

item.title: Crypto-Funded Human Trafficking Is Exploding
item.description: The use of cryptocurrency in sales of human beings for prostitution and scam compounds nearly doubled in 2025, according to a conservative estimate. M...

item.title: How to Choose the Right TV in 2026 (and a Few We Like)
item.description: How many ports do you need? What does 4K UHD even mean? What's RGB LED? Hereâs everything you need to know.

item.title: Elon Musk's X Appears to Be Violating US Sanctions by Selling Premium Accounts to Iranian Leaders
item.description: While publicly supporting protesters in Iran, Elon Musk's X appears to have been selling premium accounts to regime officials. Checkmarks were removed...

item.title: US FTC airs concerns over allegations that Apple News suppresses right-wing content
item.description: In a letter to Apple CEO Tim Cook, FTC chair Andrew Ferguson cited reports from Media Research Center, a right-leaning think tank, which accused Apple...

item.title: Eclipse backs all-EV marketplace Ever in $31M funding round
item.description: The San Francisco-based startup says its AI-first approach has allowed it to scale faster.

item.title: Apple acquires all rights to Severance, will produce future seasons in-house
item.description: The show is expected to run for four seasons, with the possibility of spin-offs, a prequel, and foreign versions.

item.title: Hereâs What Itâs Like to Use TurboTaxâs Mobile App to File Taxes on Your Own (2026)
item.description: Sigh. Another tax season is upon us. I filed my taxes with TurboTax, exploring its newest features and free or low-cost filing options.

item.title: xAI lays out interplanetary ambitions in public all-hands
item.description: On Wednesday, xAI took the rare step of publishing its full 45-minute all-hands presentation to the X platform, making it widely available.

item.title: AI inference startup Modal Labs in talks to raise at $2.5B valuation, sources say
item.description: General Catalyst is in talks to lead the round for the four-year-old startup, according to our sources.
